description: The application is simple and clear. It has significantly helped me with my work for several years now.
author: Andres P.
pros: I appreciate the most in the application the ability, as an on-site coordinator for music events with 50+ participants, to handle everything. And that from a mobile phone. From recording arrival/departure times, through individual work assignments for employees, to the subsequent completion and closure of the event. At the same time, I would highlight the simplicity of managing multiple concurrent shifts at large events. I also have the ability to manage my overall workload, check my income, and have complete information about my work in one place.
cons: The errors I encounter while using it are mostly caused by coordinator (user) mistakes. Therefore, apart from a few technical glitches (which were promptly resolved each time), I have nothing to complain about so far.

description: The team at Sinch have been supersonically quick in resolving any minor issues or explaining easily to us, whenever we need guidance on any system features, to date cannot fault any aspect of our collaboration with Sinch, using Sinch gives me total confidence when accepting and booking large jobs.
author: Robert T.
pros: Sinch totally revolutionised our operation, i enjoy using sinch daily, our team integrate well with the system, effortless production of bookings, timesheets and invoices.
cons: The team at Sinch have been supersonically quick in resolving any minor issues or explaining easily whenever we need guidance on any system features, to date cannot fault any aspect of our collaboration with Sinch

author: Stanislava M.
pros: easy to with the flow, intuitive, transparent
cons: missed some functions, not that much flexible
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Having such a versatile and easy-to-use tool has allowed the whole company to focus on specific objectives. We have more time to train people, find clients, etc. It is this versatility, working in the full spectrum of the light we see, that allows for excellent management of both the entire office team and employees in the field.
author: Patryk S.
pros: An all in one product, despite such incredible versatility every aspect is catered for.
cons: I can't think of anything, it's a really successful product

description: Once you start using it, you dont want to use anything else.
author: Wojciech K.
pros: Ability to forget about excel sheets in case of staff scheduling.
cons: Invoicing feature could be better, but is not very bad.

description: Our experience with OnSinch has been a pleasure and we are extremely grateful for the role it plays in our growth.
author: Shea T.
pros: Hundred Strong cannot express our gratitude towards the OnSinch and it's people more, it is extremely crucial towards our success. The systems efficiency and simplicity whilst covering all the bases makes it the perfect tool for our needs.
cons: Nothing we have disliked thus far with the system!

description: It is easy to use, you can create the job description with hour and role. People can candidate themself to the shift.
author: Marina V.
pros: It is very easy to use, hostess and [sensitive content hidden] can read all details of the job by themself. It is user friendly and can contain all the information to work
cons: Not flexible... we are waiting for 2 very important features: download the composit card in different languages and create directly the contract

author: Ivana D.
pros: I like the most its simplicity, it covers all our needs as a stuffing agency, the customer service is great!
cons: I have nothing I can complain about. Maybe I would avoid upgrades after I already get used to something. But it is development, new customers are probably happy about it.

author: Patricie J.
pros: OnSinch is an application designed for companies that are responsible for multiple employees and need to place them efficiently and effectively. It saves time not only for admins/coordinators but also for the employees themselves. Behind the application are qualified staff, willing to help at any time and solve any difficult problem.
cons: From my position, I don't see a problem that needs to be faulted.

review_title: Great software for a crewing company
description: Great team to work with with nice people. Work nice for our type of business (events).
author: Hannes T.
pros: It covers everything needed to run a crew company in an automated and complete way.
cons: User interface and experience could be a bit easier / straightforward.

review_title: Muy buena aplicacion de gestion de personal y clientes
author: Miguel Marcelo D.
pros: la facilidad de uso y multiples opciones
cons: integracion de otras app en la plataforma

review_title: Beneficial and helpful since the beginning of the app's existence
author: Stepan B.
pros: Simplicity, time saving, user support, development. When you dream of the best workforce management app, it's nowhere near as good as OnSinch.
cons: I never had the feeling that there was something wrong with OnSinch, or that something was missing.

review_title: Great tool for any cultural event
description: Long time used with any essential problem. It is a great professional tool for our work in the venue (music & theatre), definitely I would recommend it for all cultural events.
author: Pavel S.
pros: Variability, quickness and ease of filling out the shift work form.
cons: Waiting to get confirmation of particular shifts. Would appreciate to receive notification when shift is confirmed.

description: I work with them for many years and i know their philosophy and the story from the begining. And it is great. Their services are necessary to hafe for producing any event.
author: David M.
pros: I love people who work there, their proffesional and human workspace
cons: Nothing, they are great. I have no bad experience.

author: Pavel Z.
pros: Easy orientation in the environment. A clear system for planning, which is often one of the most important things. The perfect tool for organizational needs.
cons: So far we haven't discovered any major glitches

description: Thanks to OnSinch I have no need to work with any other similar product.
author: Jakub R.
pros: Easy to work with, provides all necessary informations instantly.
cons: Would like to have some more auto-fill options.

description: My focus is technical production for cultural/theater projects. I switched to the application due to the need to improve communication and information flow in the complicated operation of the Jatka78 theater. I had the opportunity to try several solutions, but onSinch came out as the winner - complex, without the need to make compromises. I finally managed the work that was previously done by 3 people myself, accurately and without mistakes. OnSinch now accompanies me in all the more demanding projects (Jatka78, Azyl78, Festival Arena, Forman Brothers Theatre, The Conference of the Birds Tour). I will not let it go. The more demanding the operation, the more useful it becomes. However, it is not just a tool that makes work easier for managers. Its strength lies mainly in its ability to provide employees with various options, motivate them, and facilitate shift selection.
author: Antonin H.
pros: Online management from anywhere, everything in one place, clarity, customer service and assistance with implementation, easy planning and financial overview, setting of professions and salaries. For employees - easy shift selection, all necessary information, synchronizable calendar. Work becomes game - managers and employees just complete their quests :)
cons: At first it seemed complicated because it is a really robust system with many options, but with the onSinch team it is possible to reduce the menu and everything to and adapt it to the specific needs of the operation. Once you get used to it, it's hard to do other projects in Excel spreadsheets.

review_title: After years of searching: Finally a tool that speaks Crew Language 🤘
description: I was one of the first in our industry to throw my planning online — somewhere around 2010 — just so I could tweak schedules right there on location. Since then, I’ve been on a long, painful hunt for the perfect planning tool. I’ve tried several along the way, but nothing ever beat my messy-but-reliable online Excel sheet. A year ago, I gave it another go — demo after demo — and then I landed at OnSinch. For the first time, I felt like a software company wasn’t trying to drain my wallet, but actually wanted to help crew companies like mine. These folks come from the event world themselves, and it shows in every detail. The platform is packed with features, fully customizable, and once you get the hang of it, it’s pure gold. Sure, at first it’s a lot to take in, but their onboarding process is smooth as hell — they walk you through everything until it clicks. They don’t clock out on you; they genuinely want you to get the most out of their tool. Every question gets answered, every tiny problem gets a thoughtful solution. I’m not even using OnSinch at full power yet, but it already proved its worth — for both our crew and our clients. Even the “old-school-grey-bearded” crew members picked it up right away. The OnSinch team itself? Absolute legends. Smart, approachable, and they somehow already feel like friends. If you run a crew company and want a planning tool that actually understands your chaos — this is it. OnSinch rocks. -Radja, Hands 4 Events, Belgium
author: Radja G.
pros: Built by event-people for event-people. All-in-one platform: Scheduling, staffing, finance, communication... Strong scheduling features: drag-&-drop calendar views, open shifts/self-registration, attendance tracking... Mobile-friendly access. Good onboarding & support: The kind of team that stays with you until you seriously use the tool. Customisable: You can tailor many aspects to your own process and structure
cons: Steep learning curve initially: With so many features and flexibility, at first it can feel like “whoa — there’s a lot going on”. Customisation + flexibility = you need to invest time in setup: Unlike an “out-of-the-box” minimal tool, you’ll get the most when you dedicate effort to configuring it. But honestly, these “cons” are just pros in disguise, they only mean the system is powerful enough to grow with you.

description: My overall experience with OnSinch has been excellent. It’s a smart and reliable CRM that makes managing large teams and complex projects easy and efficient. I consider it as essential to my work as Apple Pay, my phone, walkie-talkie, or keys. It runs operations smoothly — whether in a gallery, at a festival, or managing staff on any kind of project — and it’s highly intuitive. The support team is fantastic: quick, helpful, and genuinely caring. Highly recommended!
author: Matouš F.
pros: ONSINCH is an amazing CRM tool for organizing large teams and complex projects. It covers everything you need — from paperwork to shift management — all in one place. What I truly appreciate is their support team: they’re not just efficient but genuinely human. Whether it’s a big issue or a small question, they’re always ready to help quickly and kindly. Highly recommended!
cons: The versatility of this tool has its pros and cons. Sometimes it takes a bit longer to find the right setup or make full use of all the available features — and there are a lot of them. I know this well, as I’ve already been involved in three different implementations of this system.

description: Overall we are extremely satisfied with using Onsinch since we signed up early in 2025. We receive regular updates and help is always at hand at a moments notice should it be needed. Veronika is great!
author: Jack K.
pros: The simplified navigation on the system really helps. The customer service provided from day 1 has also been excellent. It's quick and easy to book jobs, allocate crews and create individual price lists for clients.
cons: Lots of options to choose from so can be a little daunting when learning the system from the very beginning.

review_title: Amazing system - even better people behind it!
description: We are very happy we started using the system this year. It has greatly improved our work capacity and output. Huge thumbs up from us.
author: Sara S.
pros: The system has made our lives SO much easier, helping us streamline our business. And if we ever experience any problems, the lovely people behind the system are ready to help. We really appreciate the personal aspect of this company, where we feel part of a family.
cons: It can be tricky to learn the system, because it can do so much! But once you know it, it rocks. And if you ever miss features, the people behind the system are there to help and they have developed several features on request from us (which of course will add to the list of things to learn for newcomers to the system - but that is a very small price to pay :-)

description: Best platform we have ever used, support is very help
author: Anthony K.
pros: Has made the day to day of running the crew so much easier and more streamlined
cons: There isn’t anything bad to say about the platform.

author: Matthew T.
pros: It does the whole system for us, from quote to invoice and all the crew organisation in between.
cons: The scheduler still needs some work, but the system gets updated very regularly.

review_title: OnSinch - a perfect tool for all your events crewing & planning services
author: Dorian A.
pros: The ease of use, the implementation, the UI for the platform. Everything just works so wonderfully well.
cons: Not applicable. Great tool for events crew planning.
author_profession: Head of Business and Legal Affairs

description: Amazing from start to finish, the onboarding has been very smooth. Nothing is too much bother for you guys, and we're all now starting to get our heads round it.
author: Paz B.
pros: Ease of use, ergonomically intuitive, yet highly comprehensive.
cons: No calendar view, Can't assign different rates to crew per profession thus having to set up detailed ratings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
